statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); total=$((total_in + total_out)); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); raw_model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model // empty'); case "$raw_model" in *opus-4-6*) model_label="Opus 4.6" ;; *sonnet-4-6*) model_label="Sonnet 4.6" ;; *haiku-4-5*) model_label="Haiku 4.5" ;; *) model_label="$raw_model" ;; esac; project_key=$(echo "$cwd" | sed 's|/|-|g'); project_total=$(python3 ~/.claude/bin/count-project-tokens.py "$project_key" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf "Context: %.1f%% | Tokens: %'d | %s | Project: %s | %s" "$used" "$total" "$model_label" "${project_total:-?}" "$cwd"; else printf "%s" "$cwd"; fi
